name: Landscape of a large lake during sunset from the air
description: 王勃写“落霞与孤鹜齐飞，秋水共长天一色”，湖面与暮色常让人想到这种开阔、安静的东方水天意象。
licenseNotes: Mixkit item page marks this clip as Free Download for commercial or personal use under the Mixkit Stock Video Free License; no attribution required by Mixkit free stock video FAQ.

name: Drone Pullback Over Lake
description: 湖泊像大地的缓冲器，调节气候、涵养水源，也把山林的季节变化留在倒影里。
licenseNotes: Mixkit item page marks this clip as Free Download for commercial or personal use under the Mixkit Stock Video Free License; no attribution required by Mixkit free stock video FAQ.

name: Sunset Reveal Over Scenic Lagoon

name: Swiss Alps snow background time-lapse

name: Aerial view of a city during the night
description: 东京从江户城下町发展为现代巨型都市，铁路、河道和街区共同织成了它高密度却有秩序的城市肌理。

name: City of Tokyo at night
description: 东京夜色里的灯火来自无数小街、车站和办公楼，现代都市的效率背后，仍保留着江户时代街区生活的影子。
licenseNotes: Mixkit item page marks this clip as Free Download for commercial or personal use under the Mixkit Stock Video Free License; no attribution required by Mixkit free stock video FAQ.

name: Top view of Tokyo Cargo Port

licenseNotes: Mixkit item page marks this clip as Free Download for commercial or personal use under the Mixkit Stock Video Free License; no attribution required by Mixkit free stock video FAQ.

name: Wave Rock Horizon Ocean Sun Beach

name: Mountains Peaks Clouds Sunset Sky

name: Campfire Flames Night Fire Camp

name: Japanese Castle Castle Himeji Castle

name: Winter Snow Nature Cold Frost

name: Bird Shrike Scalpel Natural Flying

name: Sailboats Water Castle Sea Castle

licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.
reviewNotes: 船只主体较明显，用户已审片并要求上传。

name: Sea Ocean Seagulls Birds Sunset
locationName: Seagulls over the sea at sunset
description: 日落时分，海鸟沿着浪线寻找气流和食物。群鸥掠过海面时，天空、潮水和迁徙本能短暂连成同一种方向。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Grass Dew Field Fog Morning
locationName: Dewy grass field in morning fog
description: 清晨的露珠来自夜间降温后的水汽凝结，细草在雾气里显得柔软而明亮。日光升起之前，田野会保留一天中最安静的湿度。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Cat Feline Animal Mammal Kitten
description: 猫科动物的感官敏锐，耳朵、胡须和瞳孔会持续读取周围细节。安静趴卧时，它们仍保留着猎手的警觉与柔软。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Nature Rain Plant Water Garden
description: 雨滴落在叶片上，会沿着叶脉汇成细小水路，再回到土壤。庭院植物在降雨中舒展，像把季节的呼吸放近了看。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Macro Clock Glitter Mechanism Time
description: 机械钟表把时间拆成齿轮、弹簧和擒纵结构，精密零件在微小摩擦中保持节奏。闪光掠过金属表面时，时间也像有了可见的纹理。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.
reviewNotes: 器物微距，用户已审片并要求上传。

name: Planet Earth World Planets
description: 从太空望向地球，海洋、大气和大陆被薄薄的蓝色边界连在一起。蓝星的静默旋转，让昼夜、季风与生命都显得辽阔而珍贵。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Nebula Red Debris Cosmic Star Space
description: 星云常由尘埃、气体和恒星遗迹构成，红色辉光像宇宙深处缓慢展开的云。它提醒人们，恒星的诞生与消散都在漫长时间里发生。

name: Earth Planet Space Universe Sun
description: 太阳照亮地球边缘时，白昼从弧线一侧慢慢铺开。人类所有城市、海洋与森林，都在这颗行星的薄层大气里呼吸。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Rain Water Window Wet Drops
description: 雨滴沿玻璃慢慢汇合，表面张力和重力把水痕拉成长线。窗外的世界被折射得模糊，雨声也因此显得更近。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Clouds Sky Blue White Nature
description: 白云由细小水滴和冰晶悬浮而成，风把它们推成层次不同的形状。晴空里的云影，是天气最轻的一种笔迹。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Ink Water Underwater Foam Smoke
description: 墨色进入水中后，会被扩散、涡流和密度差拉成云雾般的形状。微小的流体运动不断分叉，像一场安静的化学书写。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Jellyfish Tentacles Nature Ocean
description: 水母属于刺胞动物，身体大多由水构成，柔软伞状体随着海流收放。透明触须在海水里延展，像古老海洋生命留下的轻柔脉搏。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Jellyfish Aquarium Exhibition
description: 水母属于刺胞动物，身体大多由水构成。水族馆里的蓝色光线让透明伞体和细长触须更清楚，像把海洋中古老而柔软的生命节律放慢。

name: Jellyfish Sea Dangerous Underwater
description: 水母用伞状体的收缩在海水中缓慢前行，触手上的刺细胞既是防御，也是捕食工具。它们没有骨骼，却已经在海洋里延续了极漫长的时间。

name: Fishes Small Aquarium Small Fish
description: 小型鱼类依靠尾鳍推进，也用胸鳍和背鳍微调姿态。它们在水中短暂停留、转向和漂移，像把流体里的平衡感写成细小的银色笔画。
licenseNotes: Pixabay Content License allows free use without attribution, including commercial use and modification; standalone redistribution of unmodified media is restricted.

name: Ocean Waves Sand Sunlight
description: 阳光进入浅海后被波纹反复折射，在沙面上留下流动的亮线。海底细沙会随潮汐轻轻重排，记录着水流和风的细微变化。

name: Waves Ocean Sea Underwater Water
description: 海面上的波浪会把阳光切成不断移动的光束。水越深，红色光越早被吸收，蓝绿色逐渐占据视野，安静地显出海水的厚度。

name: Aquarium Fishes Catfish Swim Ocean

name: Fish Reef Anemone Skunk Clown

name: Ocean Sea Worms Tentacles

name: Ocean Underwater Diving Water

name: Mountains Snow River Underwater

name: Animals Ocean Underwater Diving

name: Tiles Pool Model Waves Sand

name: Underwater Rays Light Sun

name: Book Pages Literature Beach Ocean

reviewNotes: 用户标记为“生活人物”；公开版无该主分类，因画面核心为海边书页与海岸环境，暂归入 Landscapes 待审。

name: Beach Sea Waves Sunrise

name: Sea Ocean Wave Beach Blue Nature
